title: Marketplace Manager - Blue Dart - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Blue Dart - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Blue Dart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Blue Dart:
Blue Dart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart!
